Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.list

Interface ITableColumnInfoSource

All Known Implementing Classes:
AAVSOFormatPhasePlotColumnInfoSource, AAVSOFormatRawDataColumnInfoSource, ArbitraryFormatPhasePlotColumnInfoSource, ArbitraryFormatRawDataColumnInfoSource, SimpleFormatPhasePlotColumnInfoSource, SimpleFormatRawDataColumnInfoSource
public interface ITableColumnInfoSource
This interface must be implemented by any class wanting to be a source of table model column information: column count, values, names.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getColumnCount()
    Return the number of columns associated with this source.
    int
    getColumnIndexByName(String name)
    Given a column name, return the index.
    Collection<String>
    getColumnNames()
    Return the names of the table columns for this source.
    int
    getDiscrepantColumnIndex()
    Return the index of the "is-discrepant" column.
    Class<?>
    getTableColumnClass(int index)
    Given a column index return the type for that table column.
    String
    getTableColumnTitle(int index)
    Given a column index return a title for a table column.
    Object
    getTableColumnValue(int index, ValidObservation ob)
    Given a column index and a valid observation, return an object for a table column.

  • Method Details

    • getColumnCount

      int getColumnCount()
      Return the number of columns associated with this source.
      Returns:
      The column count.

    • getColumnNames

      Collection<String> getColumnNames()
      Return the names of the table columns for this source.
      Returns:
      The column names.

    • getDiscrepantColumnIndex

      int getDiscrepantColumnIndex()
      Return the index of the "is-discrepant" column.
      Returns:
      The index in question.

    • getTableColumnTitle

      String getTableColumnTitle(int index)
      Given a column index return a title for a table column.
      Parameters:
      index - A column index.
      Returns:
      The column name.

    • getTableColumnClass

      Class<?> getTableColumnClass(int index)
      Given a column index return the type for that table column.
      Parameters:
      index - A column index.
      Returns:
      The column type.

    • getTableColumnValue

      Object getTableColumnValue(int index, ValidObservation ob)
      Given a column index and a valid observation, return an object for a table column.
      Parameters:
      index - A column index.
      ob - A valid observation.
      Returns:
      The column value.

    • getColumnIndexByName

      int getColumnIndexByName(String name)
      Given a column name, return the index.
      Parameters:
      name - The column name.
      Returns:
      The index of the specified column.
